---
title: "컴퓨터 기초"
categories: [basics, computer]
listing: 
    contents:
        - "*.qmd"
        - "!index.qmd"
    fields: [title, description, date-modified]
    type: table
    sort: "date-modified desc"
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    categories: true
sidebar: note
---

Shell commands, SSH, VSCode, Vim 등
